title: Filter bypass via roleplay prompt
desc: Documented method for making the toy ignore content filters. Reported to manufacturer; no patch yet.

title: Voice data retention longer than disclosed
desc: Independent test found recordings stored for 90+ days despite privacy policy claim of 30.

title: Parental dashboard intermittent outage
desc: Chat-log review feature unavailable for 3 days in late October.

title: Recall issued in EU markets
desc: Manufacturer issued voluntary recall over microphone activation bug.
